MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.ACCESS_CONTROL_BYPASS -> "Don't rely on client IP headers for access control. Implement proper authentication and authorization. Use consistent access control across path variations and HTTP methods."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.ACCOUNT_TAKEOVER -> "Implement secure password reset flows with short-lived tokens. Require email verification for email changes. Use rate limiting on auth endpoints."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.API_VERSION_BYPASS -> "Deprecate old API versions completely. Don't leave deprecated versions accessible. Use consistent security across all versions."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.BACKUP_DISCLOSURE -> "Don't store backup files in web-accessible directories. Configure web server to block common backup extensions. Use secure backup storage."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.BFLA, VulnClass.BAC_HORIZONTAL, VulnClass.BAC_VERTICAL -> "Implement role-based access control. Verify user permissions for each action."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.BUSINESS_LOGIC -> "Review business logic for edge cases. Implement proper validation and state management."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.CACHE_DECEPTION -> "Don't cache responses based on URL extension alone. Use Cache-Control headers. Validate authentication before serving cached content."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.CACHE_POISONING -> "Don't use unkeyed headers in cached responses. Validate all header inputs. Use separate caches for authenticated/unauthenticated content."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.CMDI -> "Avoid system commands with user input. If necessary, use strict allowlists and proper escaping."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.CORS_MISCONFIGURATION -> "Use explicit allowlist for origins. Never reflect arbitrary origins. Avoid wildcard with credentials."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.CSRF -> "Implement anti-CSRF tokens. Use SameSite cookies and verify Origin/Referer on state-changing requests."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.DEBUG_EXPOSURE -> "Disable debug endpoints in production. Use environment-based configuration. Protect actuator endpoints with authentication."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.EMAIL_HEADER_INJECTION -> "Sanitize all email header inputs. Strip newlines and carriage returns. Use email libraries that handle escaping."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.GIT_EXPOSURE -> "Block access to .git directories in web server config. Don't deploy version control directories. Use .gitignore and verify deployment scripts."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.GRAPHQL_INJECTION -> "Disable introspection in production. Implement query depth/complexity limits."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.HEADER_INJECTION, VulnClass.CRLF_INJECTION -> "Strip or encode CR/LF characters from user input used in HTTP headers."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.HOST_HEADER_INJECTION -> "Validate Host header against allowlist. Don't use Host header in password reset URLs or cache keys. Use absolute URLs with hardcoded domains."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.JWT_WEAKNESS -> "Use strong algorithms (RS256). Validate all JWT claims. Don't accept 'none' algorithm."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.LFI, VulnClass.PATH_TRAVERSAL -> "Validate and sanitize file paths. Use allowlists for permitted files. Avoid user input in file operations."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.MASS_ASSIGNMENT -> "Use allowlists for permitted fields in object binding. Never trust client-provided field names."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.MFA_BYPASS -> "Implement rate limiting on MFA verification. Don't expose backup codes in responses. Ensure MFA cannot be skipped via direct navigation."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.MISSING_SECURITY_HEADERS -> "Add security headers: CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.NOSQL_INJECTION -> "Use parameterized queries. Sanitize user input. Disable server-side JavaScript."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.OAUTH_MISCONFIGURATION -> "Strictly validate redirect_uri against exact match allowlist. Use state parameter with unpredictable values. Don't expose tokens in URLs."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.PRICE_MANIPULATION -> "Validate all price/quantity calculations server-side. Never trust client-provided prices. Use signed carts or recalculate totals."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.RACE_CONDITION_TOCTOU -> "Use database-level locking for critical operations. Implement idempotency keys. Use atomic operations for balance/inventory changes."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.REQUEST_SMUGGLING -> "Normalize or reject conflicting Content-Length/Transfer-Encoding headers. Use a single HTTP parser across all tiers."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.S3_MISCONFIGURATION -> "Use private bucket policies by default. Enable S3 Block Public Access. Audit bucket policies regularly. Use presigned URLs for temporary access."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.SOURCEMAP_DISCLOSURE -> "Don't deploy source maps to production. If needed, restrict access to authenticated users only. Remove sourceMappingURL comments."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.SQLI -> "Use parameterized queries or prepared statements. Never concatenate user input into SQL queries."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.SSRF -> "Validate and allowlist destination URLs. Block requests to internal networks and cloud metadata endpoints."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.SSTI -> "Use logic-less templates or sandbox template execution. Never pass user input directly to template engines."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.SUBDOMAIN_TAKEOVER -> "Remove dangling DNS records. Monitor for unclaimed resources. Use CNAME verification before DNS changes."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.UNRESTRICTED_FILE_UPLOAD -> "Restrict file types, validate content, store outside web root, and enforce random names."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.VERSION_DISCLOSURE -> "Remove or obfuscate version headers. Configure server to hide version info."
MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.WEAK_SESSION_TOKEN -> "Use cryptographically secure random session tokens. Use sufficient entropy."

MaxLineLength:ScannerIssueSupport.kt$ScannerIssueSupport$VulnClass.XSS_REFLECTED, VulnClass.XSS_STORED, VulnClass.XSS_DOM -> "Encode all user input before rendering in HTML. Use Content-Security-Policy headers."
